name: Neonode Inc.
summary: Neonode Inc. (NEON) is a technology company focused on touch technology licensing. The company develops and licenses touch technology to manufacturers who incorporate it into their products. Neonode derives revenue primarily through royalty licensing arrangements with customers who design, manufacture, and sell products embedding Neonode's touch technology solutions.
